content:
Prompt for export:

“Export as: 1) Canonical Full Snapshot, 2) Deduplicated Content Map, 3) Fused Iterative Doc, 4) Annotated Version Trail (if available).”


⸻


Would you like me to run this process on any specific thread or folder now?


Or would you like to save this protocol as a .md file to drop into your system as PRC01_Deduplicated_Compile_Process.md?
